title: VRF + GRE: Finance VRF'i Tunnel 10 ile R22 Tarafında Tamamla, VRF Static Routing
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: A colleague started configuring a new network. All configurations on R11 are complete and communication between R11 and R22 is functional. Complete the configurations on R22 for the tasks below.
Task 1: Extend the Finance VRF between R11 and R22 using Tunnel 10.
Task 2: Complete the Finance VRF configuration on R22 and configure static routing so that traffic between VLAN 111 and VLAN 222 uses Tunnel 10 exclusively.
Note: Sw22 can be used to validate traffic flow.
hints: Bu item'da tunel agi 10.10.10.0/30 (Item 9'daki 10.10.100.0/30 ile karistirma) — R22 ucu .2.
VLAN 111'e giden trafik icin next-hop tunelin karsi ucu (10.10.10.1); VLAN 222 icin Sw22 (10.22.22.2).
answer_key_raw:
R22:
R22> enable
R22# configure terminal
R22(config)# interface Ethernet0/1
R22(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding Finance
R22(config-if)# ip address 10.22.22.1 255.255.255.252
R22(config-if)# no shutdown
R22(config-if)# exit
R22(config)# interface Tunnel10
R22(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding Finance
R22(config-if)# ip address 10.10.10.2 255.255.255.252
R22(config-if)# tunnel source Ethernet0/0
R22(config-if)# tunnel destination 209.165.200.230
R22(config-if)# no shutdown
R22(config-if)# exit
R22(config)# ip route vrf Finance 10.10.111.0 255.255.255.0 10.10.10.1
R22(config)# ip route vrf Finance 10.10.222.0 255.255.255.0 10.22.22.2
R22(config)# end
R22# write
explanation: Item 9'un aynasi, R22 tarafi: Tunnel10 VRF Finance'e alinir, 10.10.10.2/30 verilir; kaynak e0/0, hedef R11'in ISP adresi 209.165.200.230. e0/1 VRF'e alinip 10.22.22.1/30 verilir. Statik rotalar: uzak VLAN111 agi tunel karsi ucundan (10.10.10.1), yerel VLAN222 agi Sw22'den (10.22.22.2).
